story-context.title: Custom ppc64le Keycloak Docker Image
story-context.summary: Build custom Keycloak 26.4.2 Docker image for ppc64le architecture using UBI9-based multi-stage build, enabling EAF deployment on all enterprise platforms (amd64, arm64, ppc64le).
story-context.key-deliverables: - docker/keycloak/Dockerfile.ppc64le (UBI9 → Maven build → Runtime) - scripts/build-keycloak-ppc64le.sh (automation script) - Image pushed with tag: keycloak:26.4.2-ppc64le - docker-compose.ppc64le.yml variant - Quarterly rebuild schedule documented
story-context.testing: Image tested on ppc64le (QEMU emulation or real hardware if available), Build process validated, Quarterly rebuild schedule established
